title: acetosella brevicaulis
intro: Acetosella brevicaulis, also known as the dwarf cranberry or small cranberry, is a small, deciduous shrub native to the Arctic tundra. It has been used for its medicinal properties, which include its astringent and antiseptic qualities, as well as its ability to act as a natural diuretic. The health benefits of Acetosella brevicaulis include its potential to aid in the treatment of urinary tract infections and to help reduce inflammation and improve digestion. Acetosella brevicaulis can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, with the leaves and stems being used to make these herbal preparations.
